footer.tagline: Discover and book the best hotels across Tajikistan. Your trusted travel companion.

home.heroSubtitle: Search handpicked hotels and resorts — from city luxury to mountain escapes.
home.destinationCopy: From modern capital stays to high-altitude adventures, find a base for every kind of journey.
home.whyCopy: A focused collection of stays across Tajikistan, built to make planning clear from search to check-in.
home.ctaTitle: Build a journey around the way you travel
home.ctaCopy: Tell our travel assistant your dates, budget, and interests for a personalized Tajikistan plan.

feature.priceText: Great rates on every hotel across Tajikistan.
feature.instantText: Book in minutes with secure, instant booking.
feature.supportText: Our team is here to help whenever you need it.

tours.title: Tours & Experiences
tours.subtitle: Curated trips across Tajikistan — mountains, lakes, history and culture.
tours.lookingForStay: Looking for a place to stay too?

pamir-highway.title: Pamir Highway Expedition
pamir-highway.summary: Drive the legendary M41 through the Pamir mountains, alpine lakes and remote villages.

dushanbe-city.title: Dushanbe City & Culture
dushanbe-city.summary: Museums, Rudaki Park, bazaars and the best local cuisine in the capital.

iskanderkul.title: Iskanderkul Lake Retreat
iskanderkul.summary: Turquoise mountain lake, waterfalls and stargazing in the Fann Mountains.

khujand-heritage.title: Khujand Heritage Trail
khujand-heritage.summary: Ancient fortress, Panjshanbe Bazaar and the history of the Silk Road city.

wakhan-valley.title: Wakhan Valley Discovery
wakhan-valley.summary: Border valley views of the Hindu Kush, hot springs and Silk Road forts.

fann-trek.title: Seven Lakes Trek
fann-trek.summary: Hike the famous Haft Kul — seven jewel-colored lakes in the Fann Mountains.

settings.title: Settings

about.title: About TajikistanHotels
about.subtitle: We're building the first modern hotel & travel platform for Tajikistan — making it effortless to discover, compare, and book the perfect stay anywhere in the country.
about.missionText: From the bustle of Dushanbe to the peaks of the Pamirs, great places to stay should be easy to find and trust. We bring hotels, apartments, and resorts together in one place with transparent pricing and a booking experience that just works.
about.valueTrustedText: Encrypted payments, verified hotels, and free cancellation on every stay.
about.valueLocalText: Built for Tajikistan — from Dushanbe city hotels to remote Pamir resorts.
about.valueModernText: A fast, clean booking flow with instant confirmation in just a few clicks.
about.valueHelpText: A dedicated support team available around the clock, whenever you travel.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Questions about a booking or your hotel listing? We're here to help.

assistant.greeting: Hi! I'm your travel assistant. Ask me for hotel recommendations, things to do, or a trip plan.
